title: EU Industrial Policy and Chinese Investment in Europe
question: How do recent EU industrial policy changes affect Chinese companies' investment strategies in Europe?
scope: Analyze the impact of key EU policy instruments—Net-Zero Industry Act, Critical Raw Materials Act, Foreign Subsidies Regulation, European Chips Act, and anti-subsidy trade measures—on Chinese companies' investment decisions, localization requirements, and market access in Europe. Include at least one industry case study.
